choices.label: Polarvelden middelgroot; endexine dunner dan ektexine; brochi max. 2,0–2,2 µm; muri simplicolumellaat.

outcome.text:
21.6 *Oxalis stricta*-type

PForml ca. 0,9–1,35. Exine (1,5)1,8–2,2 µm. *O. acetosella* is scabraat met tectum perforatum (S. 146).

*Oxalis corniculata* L. (2)
33,0–42,0 µm, MiW 37,7 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Oxalis stricta* L. (4)
23,5–31,5 µm, MiW 28,4 µm; 50 PK, 0a
